scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/gusto-pos run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm --filter @workspace/gusto-pos run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/desktop-app run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/desktop-app run package:mac
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:integration
